summary: Tiers+metrics re-fetched live: 0 moves/0 changes. WCL rdps 500: 5 cuts unreachable, 3 raw landed. Wowhead tank-M+ blocked, carried. Archon surv empty. No new build; 2 vids queued.

sources.detail: All 6 pages (raid+M+, all roles) fetched live via curl; parsed from table.tier-list rows (img alt + class-slug; in-description spell icons excluded). Era-verified Midnight/Season 1/12.0.7/Devourer. 80 assignments (40 raid + 40 M+), 0 unmatched, 0 tier moves vs stored.

Both pages fetched live; parsed from tier__tier s/a/b/c-tier blocks via de-hyphenated /images/icons/spec/<class>/<spec>.png slugs. Era-verified (Devourer present). Raid 39 (Vengeance DH still omitted upstream — absence, not error), M+ 40 → 79 rows, 0 moves vs stored.

5 of 6 pages fetched via r.jina.ai and parsed from numbered ranking lists (lenient for -Tier/missing-paren idioms); era-verified Midnight Season 1. 74 rows, 0 moves vs stored. tank-M+ page unreachable this run (jina returned a 282b cached probe; direct fetch = 919b Cloudflare challenge) — its 6 stored rows carried unchanged, era re-confirmed Midnight S1 via the page header (WebFetch). Total 80 rows intact.

All 6 raid(throughput)/M+(score) pages parsed from __NEXT_DATA__ specTierListSection; 80 rows matched roster via /wow/builds/<spec>/<class>/ slugs, 0 unmatched; upstream lastUpdated raid 2026-07-16T12:00Z, M+ 2026-07-17T12:00Z. 0 moves vs stored. specRankingsSection numbers re-parsed (160 rows) — 0 value changes vs stored.

Full re-fetch of all 9 raid bosses (throughput) + 8 M+ dungeons (score) across all 3 roles (51 pages); every encounter parsed 40/40 specs from __NEXT_DATA__. 680 cells, 0 unmatched, 0 changed vs stored; encounter-tiers.json asOf already 2026-07-17, left unchanged.

Survivability tierList returned EMPTY (tiers: []) on all 3 raid pages this fetch — transient upstream state (throughput on the same pages was full at 27/7/6). Nothing to parse; stored 40 survivability rows left unchanged at asOf 2026-07-17 (within the 10-day threshold). Not an error.

All 3 M+ pages (DPS/Healer/Tank) fetched via r.jina.ai; Rankings-table Tier column parsed (X/Unranked skipped), 40 specs matched by spec-slug URL. 0 moves vs stored. Raid pages still 0-records upstream — left unranked (snapshot null).

Per the pre-agent deterministic WCL fetch step (wcl-fetch/evidence.json, verdict rdps-broken, attemptedAt 2026-07-17T16:19:57Z): characterRankings(metric: rdps) returns a bare Internal server error on encounter 3176 — the redistributed-credit metric family is still broken upstream. Agent holds no WCL credentials and did not fetch warcraftlogs.com. Zone 46 Mythic medians unchanged at the 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); no zone 47 M+ cut can honestly land. Data unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); zone 54 (all 3 role cuts) cannot land. 12.1 PTR raid-testing normalized scores unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); zone 56 (DPS/tank/healer) cannot land. 12.1 PTR M+ testing metrics unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Same upstream rdps Internal server error (evidence.json rdps-broken); zone 52 Dummy Dome aggregate=amount median rDPS cannot land. spec.ptrDummy unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.

The deterministic src/fetch-wcl.mjs step (frozen recipe) re-paginated each DPS dummy metric:dps leaderboard and merged 103 per-spec raw-DPS medians before the agent started (evidence.landed wcl-dummy-raw = 103 rows; players 1T:2000 2T:160 3T:111 5T:1532). Agent did not re-fetch or edit these rows; asOf 2026-07-17.

The deterministic fetch step pooled zone-54 Heroic best-parse raw-DPS across 8 bosses (6 with players: Nek zali 370, Sentinels 363, Vashnik 678, Lost Explorers 150, Sszorak 184, Twin Fangs 146; Coiled Altar and Ula tek 0 — untested windows) and merged 27 rows (evidence.landed = 27). Agent did not re-fetch or edit; asOf 2026-07-17.

The deterministic fetch step pooled zone-56 S2 PTR key raw-DPS across all 8 dungeons (players 619-2000 each) and merged 27 rows (evidence.landed = 27). Agent did not re-fetch or edit; asOf 2026-07-17.

40/40 rows (27 DPS + 7 healer + 6 tank) fetched live via plain GET; parsed for the top-50 avg M+ rating ceiling (range 3738-4288). Era-verified Midnight Season 1 (the three 12.1 hits are SVG path coordinates, no season flip). 0 value changes vs stored.

26/26 non-Augmentation DPS fight profiles fetched via talent_target_scaling/castingpatchwerk; MID1 + ptr:0 confirmed on every chart; best-build DPS at counts 1/2/3/5/8/15. Augmentation absent by design. 0 target changes vs stored.

Nightly MID1_Raid report re-fetched (SimulationCraft 1205-01, WoW 12.0.7.68453 Live, hotfix 2026-07-13 — era-verified, no season flip). 26/26 DPS specs parsed as best variant per spec from the global DPS Ranking; 0 value deltas vs stored. Augmentation excluded by design.
Period 1072 MID1 (unchanged period; era-verified) parsed from /period/latest Spec representation in top keys (section-bounded); 40/40 specs, sum 100.2%. 0 value changes vs stored.

Forum thread (Discourse .json) + Wowhead news RSS both checked live. Thread tops at post #15 (Linxy Rogue Outlaw addendum, 07-14 22:46Z) under already-logged build #14 — NO new forum build. RSS newest 12.1 items are 07-16 or older, all prior-triaged (07-16 Class Tuning Hotfixes = PTR hotfixes with no forum post; 07-16 Holy Paladin tier-set review = spec already has a writeup; 07-16 M+ mob-count tooltip = not tuning). ptr-builds.json unchanged. Writeup-less specs (Aff/Demo/Destro Warlock et al.) have no source verdict in the datamined recaps — none fabricated. zone-54/52/56 evidence-only (rdps-broken, see WCL rows).

All 25 unique creator YouTube RSS feeds fetched live (25/25 OK). 3 genuinely-new videos published 07-17: AutomaticJak LHPjq9142qM (MW PTR M+ — in scope, queued pending) and MadSkillzzTV I_nFVVmv610 (12.1 best M+ healers tier list — in scope, queued pending); Supatease LcWIPLhak0E (reroll gameplay — skipped). All other unseen ids are pre-log-window back-catalog. Transcripts UNAVAILABLE: transcript-fetch/summary.json verdict no-credentials (TRANSCRIPT_API_KEY unset), 0 fetched → 0 takes / 0 metaNotes. Pending queue 18 to 20. izen (general) newest 07-15, already seen; no new build lead.
